---
title: "Power Analysis Workshop"
format:
  html:
    toc: false
---

# Power Analysis Workshop

Welcome! This website contains the materials for the **Power Analysis** workshop.

## Morning session

📊 **Lecture slides**

- [Power Analysis I and II](morning.html)

## Afternoon practical

💻 **Workshop materials**

- [Practical session](afternoon.html)

---

**University of Vic (Barcelona)**
